creator: knu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed thanks. 

Your pkg-plist had a lot of entries that are actually of mingw-binutils, 
and some missing entries such as the "gcc" binary which should be the most 
important file of this port.  Next time please check pkg-list carefully 
before submitting a patch. 

Also, since c++filt is installed by both mingw-binutils and this port, 
I added a simple workaround.  Check it out.  Thanks.
